Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: tester beds [300038737], high-post beds [300038732], beds (furniture) [300038697], sleeping and reclining furniture [300038696], furniture by form or function [300048628], furniture [300037680], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: High-post beds with arched, or in the Federal period often serpentine, as opposed to straight canopies and whose posts are generally less than six feet in height.
Úsese para camas de postes altos arqueados, o en el período federal a menudo serpentinos, como opuestos a los baldaquinos rectos y cuyos postes tienen generalmente menos de seis pies de altura.

Wordt gebruikt voor '@high-post beds' met een gewelfde in plaats van een rechte hemel. In de Federale periode werd ook vaak een hemel met slingers gebruikt. De posten zijn meestal minder dan 1.80 cm hoog.
具有拱頂的高柱床，在美國聯邦時期則常為蛇形頂，不同於床柱低於6呎且頂篷平直的床。

Term_Source.Page: GLOS, Small, folding, four-post beds: also known as tent beds.
